hero.title: Building tools that
hero.subtitle: Independent developer studio crafting browser extensions and developer tools. Simple, focused, and built with care.

products.title: Tools built with intention
products.subtitle: Every product starts from a real pain point. No feature bloat, no subscription traps. Just focused solutions.

stylesnap.name: StyleSnap
stylesnap.tagline: CSS Style Extractor + AI Code Generator
stylesnap.description: Point at any element on a webpage. Get its complete CSS, responsive code, and AI-generated alternatives. One click, zero guesswork.
features: Export to CSS / Tailwind / inline styles

coming.name: More coming soon
coming.tagline: The next tool is on the way
coming.description: We're always building. The next product is already in the workshop. Follow us to get early access.

planned.name: Your idea here
planned.description: We build what developers need. If you have a pain point that no tool solves well, let us know. We might just build it.

story.p1: LucidLibs is an independent developer studio. Not a startup, not a team of 50. One person who builds tools for developers — because the best software comes from someone who actually uses it.
story.p2: I got tired of tools that over-promise and under-deliver. So I started building my own. Every product under LucidLibs started from a real frustration: a workflow that should be simpler, a task that should take seconds not hours.
story.p3LibsMeaning: (libraries, tools). Software that makes your life clearer, not more complicated.

principles.title: Focus over features
principles.desc: Every tool solves one problem well. No bloat, no settings page fatigue.

principles.title: Fair pricing
principles.desc: One-time purchases. No subscriptions, no hidden tiers. Pay once, own forever.

principles.title: Crafted by hand
principles.desc: Not a VC-funded factory. Every pixel, every line of code is reviewed by one person who cares.

principles.title: Open conversation
principles.desc: Feedback directly shapes the roadmap. No ticket queues, no corporate walls.

footer.title: Have an idea? Let's talk.
footer.subtitle: Whether it's feedback on StyleSnap, a bug report, or an idea for the next tool — I'm always listening.
